full_command: python3 reproducibility/fp3_online_drift.py --mode full --research-root ../W-HPC [--datasets cic-ids2017 unsw-nb15 nsl-kdd]
manuscript_targets: M3 drift signal computation smoke validation
M3 drift alarm logic smoke validation
M3 frozen Part 5/Part 6 reproduction orchestration against the companion W-HPC checkout
notes: Smoke mode validates the drift-monitoring core without dataset-backed streaming protocols.
Full mode replays the frozen M3 protocol by orchestrating the exact Part 5 and Part 6 experiment scripts from a local companion checkout at ../W-HPC.
